channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump slows disaster aid approvals, disproportionately affecting Democratic states
item.description: Americans face longer waits for disaster assistance under President Trump, with delays stretching weeks or months.

item.title: Iran live updates: Jordan intercepts 8 Iranian missiles, state media reports
item.description: President Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Mexican councilwoman shot, husband killed near U.S. border
item.description: Maria de Jesus Quijada was attacked while traveling with her family. Her husband died in the shooting.

item.title: U.S. and Iran launch new attacks, trade threats as conflict escalates
item.description: Iran and the U.S. announce fresh attacks and exchange threats as the war intensifies over control of the Strait of Hormuz.
